  1. Home

  3. HP
Photosmart E317 Digital Camera

Photosmart E317 Digital Camera

(22)
ID 300938
$114.12

Point and shoot simplicity in a 5 MP camera.

In stock
Sign in to add to wish list
Get point and shoot simplicity plus crisp, true-to-life photos with this stylish and easy-to-use camera.

Get close in with 4x digital zoom, review via the clear 3.8 cm LCD then print great 10 × 15 cm photos and enlargements up to poster size.

Specs

Technical details

Print technology
  • AE bracketing
  • AE metering
  • color
  • contrast
  • EV compensation
  • image quality
  • ISO speed
  • saturation
  • sharpness
  • white balance
Video memory capacity
  • Maximum length is limited to the size of the memory card or internal memory
Size
  • 3.91 × 1.26 × 2.07 "
Safety
  • Canada [Canadian Approval (CSA, cUL or equivalent)], EEA [one European Safety Agency mark (TUV, BSI, NEMKO), CE Certificate of Conformity], US [NTRL (UL, CSA, NRTL or equivalent)], Croatia (ZIK), Czech Republic (EZU), Estonia/Lithuania (Certificates), Hungary (MEEI), Mexico (NOM), Poland (PCBC), Russia (GOST), Slovakia (EVPU), South Africa (Certificate), Slovenia (SQI), Taiwan (BSM) (Required July 2005), Israel (SII)
Aperture setting
  • Automatic
Source data-sheet
  • ICEcat.biz
Still image capacity (better mode)
  • 10 images
Still image capacity (best mode)
  • 1 MB file size
Export file formats
  • 2560 × 1920 resolution"
Picture resolution
  • 8 images
Still image capacity
  • 1.2 MB file size
Frame rate
  • 2560 × 1920 resolution" fps
Memory per slot (maximum)
  • Still image- JPEG (EXIF 2.2)
Type
  • video clips- MPEG-1"
Photo mode
  • These numbers are only a guideline
Tripod mountable
  • actual numbers will vary by use."
Picture mode
  • 24 fps
Colour control
  • 1 GB
Image control functions
  • Off (default)
  • date only
  • date and time imprinting
Direct printing
  • Yes (all-in-ones, PictBridge-enabled printers)
Languages support
  • Auto (default)
  • action
  • portrait
  • landscape
  • sunset
Technical features
  • Full colour
PhotoSmart compression
  • Off (default), date only, date and time imprinting
Control panel
  • Top of camera- 2 buttons (Shutter, Video); back of camera- 5 buttons [4-way rocker (with OK, Zoom in, Zoom out), Scroll, Flash, Self timer, Live view/Playback]
Number of layers per pallet
  • 5
LCD components
  • Live view icon
  • SD card icon
  • power indicator
  • remaining image count
  • image quality
  • Flash mode
  • Focus mode
  • date & time imprint
  • self-timer
  • Shooting mode
  • EV compensation mode
  • White balance mode
  • ISO speed mode
  • video icon
  • playback icon
  • scroll icon
  • video chip timer
  • audio clip icon
  • video clip icon
  • camera menus
Number of cartons per pallet
  • 5
Exposure type
  • Secure Digital (SD)/MultiMediaCard (MMC) slot for adding more capacity Video recording- MPEG-1, unlimited*
Upgrade type
  • audio recording- unlimited* 3.8 cm (1.5 in) diagonal display-size indoor/outdoor viewable colour LCD (557 × 234 = 130338 dots) 5 automatic shooting modes plus manual controls 2x AA Alkaline batteries 5.0 MP (2654 × 1955 total pixel count) 4x total zoom (1x optical/4x digital) 7.7 mm focal length, 46.1 mm (35 mm equivalent), f3.5 16 MB internal memory

Memory

Maximum internal memory
  • 1 GB
Internal memory
  • 16 MB
Memory slots
  • 1 slot, Secure Digital (SD) and MultiMediaCard (MMC) compatible
Storage media capacity
  • Approximate still image capacity for 16 MB internal memory- 95 images (120 KB each) = VGA resolution
Memory type
  • 21 images (500 KB each) = 1 MP
Memory upgrade
  • 18 images (600 KB each) = 3 MP GB
Compatible memory cards
  • 10 images (1.0 MB each) = 5 MP, (default)

Display

Camera display resolution
  • 557 × 234 = 130338 pixels pixels
Display
  • 3.8cm (1.5"") colour LCD (557 × 234 = 130000px)
Display diagonal
  • 1.5 "

System requirements

Minimum system requirements
  • USB-compatible PC with Pentium® II (233 MHz minimum), equivalent Celeron® or compatible
Minimum hard disk space
  • 128 MB
Minimum system requirements for Macintosh
  • 400 MB available hard disk space (for Windows® 2000, XP Home, XP Professional), 200 MB (for Windows® 98, 98 SE, Me)
Mac compatibility
  • true

Audio

Audio system
  • Unlimited (depends on memory capacity)
Audio recorder
  • true

Connectivity

PictBridge
  • Yes Direct photo printing to PictBridge-enabled printers
Interface
  • 1 USB - compatible with USB 2.0 specifications
I/O ports
  • 1 USB - compatible with USB 2.0 specifications

Lens system

Aperture range
  • f/3.5
35 mm camera lens equivalent
  • Approximately 46.1 - ? mm
Focal length
  • 7.7 focal length (equivalent - 46.1) mm
Combined zoom
  • 4x (1x optical/4x digital) x
Lens focal range
  • 1.0 m to infinity (normal, default), 0.6 to 1.0 m (macro)
Lens system
  • 4x total zoom (1x optical/4x digital) 7.7 mm focal length, 46.1 mm (35 mm equivalent), f3.5

Weight & dimensions

Dimensions W x D x H
  • 99.3 × 32 × 52.6 mm
Maximum dimensions (W x D x H)
  • 99.3 × 35.6 × 52.6 (with slider) mm
Product weight optional (metric)
  • 0.15 kg (with batteries)
Weight
  • 150 g
Product dimensions when open (LxWxD)
  • 3.91 × 1.4 × 2.07 (with slider) "
Product weight optional (imperial)
  • 0.3 lb (with batteries)

Light exposure

Light exposure rating
  • Auto (default)
  • ISO 100
  • ISO 200
  • ISO 400
Camera shutter speed
  • 2 - 1/2000 s
Light exposure correction
  • ± 2.0 EV in 1/3 steps
Light exposure control
  • Center weighted auto exposure metering (AE)
Shutter Lag
  • 0.34 sec

Picture quality

Megapixel
  • 5 MP

Energy management

Power consumption
  • 2.9 watts maximum W
Power management
  • Not applicable to universal AC power adapter
Battery life
  • Alkaline- 130 shots (maximum), approximately 100 shots (average) h
Power supply
  • NiMH- 280 shots (maximum), approximately 190 shots (average) W
Power requirements
  • Photo Lithium- 490 shots (maximum), approximately 340 shots (average)
Power supply type
  • 2 AA Alkaline, Photo Lithium, NiMH batteries or HP Photosmart 3.3 Volt AC adapter
Power source
  • 2 AA batteries (Alkaline, Photo Lithium, rechargeable NiMH) or HP Photosmart 3.3 Volt AC adapter

Environmental conditions

Non-operating relative humidity (non-condensing)
  • 15 %
  • 90 %
Operating relative humidity range
  • 15 %
  • 85 %
Operating temperature range (T-T)
  • 0 °C
  • 50 °C
Storage relative humidity range
  • 15 %
  • 90 %
Recommended humidity operating range
  • 15 to 85% RH %
Storage temperature range (T-T)
  • -30 °C
  • 65 °C

Video

Video compression formats
  • MPEG-1
Video capability
  • true
Video footnote
  • Maximum length is limited to the size of the memory card or internal memory.
Video modes resolution
  • QVGA 320 × 240 pixels

Packaging data

Case or master carton quantity
  • 4 pcs
Package dimensions (W x D x H)
  • 203 × 77 × 173 mm
Package weight
  • 520 g

Certificates

Energy Star certified
  • false

Image sensor

Effective sensor resolution
  • 5.0 MP (2560 × 1920 effective pixel count) pixels
Optical sensor size
  • 1/2.5 CCD "
Sensor type
  • (2332 × 1740 px
Aspect ratio
  • 2332 × 1740 effective px)

Focusing

Focus
  • Normal (default), macro

Flash

Flash
  • Auto flash (default), red-eye, flash on, flash off
Flash working distance
  • 2.5 m (wide at ISO 100), 3.6 m (wide at ISO 200), 5 m (wide at ISO 400, auto) 8.3 ft (wide at ISO 100), 11.9 ft (wide at ISO 200), 16.5 ft (wide at ISO 400, auto)

Operating system/software

Compatible operating systems
  • Microsoft® Windows® 98, 98 SE, Me, 2000, XP Home and Professional
Bundled software
  • Macintosh OS × 10.2 and later"

Viewfinder

Camera viewfinder
  • None

Camera

Self-timer
  • 10 s
Camera resolution
  • 5.0 MP (2654 × 1955 total pixel count) pixels
Colour depth
  • 36-bit

Light metering

Metering
  • TTL (through-the-lens)

Scene modes

Shooting modes
  • Normal (default)
  • self-timer
  • video
